name: my-claude-plugins
description: Team plugin marketplace for Claude Code extensions

metadata.description: Curated collection of Claude Code plugins for team use

plugins.name: archiuvium-plugin-creator
plugins.description: Kitchen-sink template plugin demonstrating every Claude Code plugin component type. Includes a skill that guides users through creating new plugins from scratch, with working examples of skills, commands, agents, hooks, and MCP servers.

plugins.name: shopify-qbo
plugins.description: One-way Shopify to QuickBooks Online sync pipeline. Extracts customers and orders from Shopify, transforms with field mapping and tax resolution, and loads into QBO as draft invoices with full audit trails.
